# DATASET: SuperK

**Source:** https://arxiv.org/abs/2312.12907  
**Version:** v2  
**Date:** 2023  
**Format:** EPS/ROOT/TXT  
**Size:** ~20 MB  
**License:** Public  

## Description
Data release for Super-Kamiokande.

## Content
EPS figures, ROOT files, text bins.
